previousMessages.message: Hi there, cammyendries! I'm your friendly guide here in beautiful St. Bernard Parish, Louisiana. We're on a super important mission to flood-proof our town in this fun game!  Would you like me to tell you about the history of flooding in St. Bernard Parish, or would you like to hear about our 5 game levels?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: tell me about flood
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: Great choice! Here in St. Bernard Parish, we've had some big floods because of really high river levels and strong storms, like Hurricane Katrina. It taught us how important it is to protect our homes and town, which is exactly what we'll do in our game!
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: how
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: We'll learn how to protect our town in 5 exciting game levels! Do you want to hear about them now?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: yes
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: Awesome! Here are our 5 levels:  1.  **Sandbag Defense:** Learn how to place sandbags to protect a house from rising waters. 2.  **Wildlife Rescue:** Help rescue stranded animals from the floodwaters. 3.  **Storm Drains:** Clear debris and plant blockages from the street storm drains so water can flow away. 4.  **Spillway Repair:** Fix and operate the spillway gates to channel water safely. 5.  **Save the Furniture:** Rush into a house to secure items on tables and countertops before it floods.  Which one sounds like fun to start with?
previousMessages.name: cammyendries

previousMessages.message: sa dbaf

If so, I'll show you the way to the start button!
